tasks.title: Add Synapse template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Synapse (Matrix homeserver). Needs federation endpoint proxying, WebSocket support for the client-server API, and correct headers for the .well-known discovery routes.

tasks.title: Add Seafile template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Seafile. Requires WebSocket support for real-time sync notifications (Seahub), correct proxy settings for the file-server port, and handling of the Seahub web interface.

tasks.title: Add Vaultwarden template
tasks.description: Create a template for Vaultwarden (Bitwarden-compatible server) including WebSocket support for live sync and admin path rate limiting.

tasks.title: Add Koner template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Koner. Covers reverse proxy setup, appropriate security headers, and rate limiting for the web interface.

tasks.title: Add Kuma template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Uptime Kuma, a self-hosted monitoring tool. Needs WebSocket proxying for real-time status updates and appropriate rate limiting on the status page.

tasks.title: Add Gitea template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Gitea, a lightweight self-hosted Git service. Includes SSH passthrough notes, webhook endpoint configuration, and appropriate max upload size for repository pushes.

tasks.title: Add Virtualmin template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Virtualmin web hosting control panel. Covers SSL handling, admin interface access controls, and the Webmin sub-panel proxying.

tasks.title: Add Webmin template
tasks.description: Create a BunkerWeb template for Webmin system administration panel. Includes appropriate security headers, admin access restrictions, and HTTPS redirect handling.
